zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Dampierre於1275年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布達皮時，她的父親Guy de Dampierre50歲，母親Isabelle de Luxembourg28歲。她於1300年與Jean I de Fiennes在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1323年享年48歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Dampierre于1275年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布達皮时，她的父亲Guy de Dampierre50岁，母亲Isabelle de Luxembourg28岁。她于1300年与Jean I de Fiennes在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1323年享年48岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙莫。

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Dampierre was born in 1275, in Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Guy de Dampierre, was 50 and her mother, Isabelle de Luxembourg, was 28. She married Jean I de Fiennes in 1300, in Nord, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1323, at the age of 48, and was buried in Samer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Dampierre est née en 1275, à Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Guy de Dampierre, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Luxembourg, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Jean I de Fiennes en 1300, à Nord, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1323, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Samer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Dampierre 1275 in Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Dampierre 50 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Luxembourg 28. Sie hat 1300 in Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Jean I de Fiennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1323 im Alter von 48 Jahren und wurde in Samer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Dampierre è nata il nel 1275 nel Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Guy de Dampierre, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Luxembourg, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Jean I de Fiennes nel 1300, nel Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1323, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Samer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Dampierreが1275年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベダンパエアで生まれた時，父Guy de Dampierreは50歳，母Isabelle de Luxembourgは28歳であった。1300年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードでJean I de Fiennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1323年に48歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサムルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Dampierre(이)가 1275년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 댐피르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Dampierre(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Luxembourg(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1300년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드에서 Jean I de Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 샘어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Dampierre nasceu em 1275, em Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Guy de Dampierre, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Luxembourg, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean I de Fiennes em 1300, em Nord, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1323, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Samer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Dampierre родилась в 1275 г. в местности дампьирр, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Dampierre было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Luxembourg, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean I de Fiennes в 1300 г. в местности норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1323 г. в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности сэмир, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Dampierre nació en 1275, en Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Guy de Dampierre, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Luxembourg, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Jean I de Fiennes en 1300, en Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1323, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Samer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
